items.html: Also the word Hotam [seal] — as we shall explain, God willing — is how this seal of the Malchut is drawn from the three clothings of NHY [Netzah-Hod-Yesod] of Ima, which are the three names Ehyeh: filled with Yods, with Alephs, and with Hehs. And in Gematria they are Hotam, with the inclusive unit.
